SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: CHARTER FUND, INC (THE "FUND OR "CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND") PRIMARILY PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS THAT MANAGE AND GROW NETWORKS OF SCHOOLS. THE FUND ONLY SUPPORTS ORGANIZATIONS THAT DEMONSTRATE AN IMPACT ON UNDERSERVED STUDENT POPULATIONS AND OUTSTANDING VALUE-ADDED ACADEMIC GAINS. THE FUND FOCUSES ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF CHARTER SCHOOLS. THE FUND ISSUED $70,901,400 OF GRANTS TO OR FOR THE BENEFIT OR CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS AND INCURRED ADDITIONAL CHARITABLE EXPENSES OF $15,029,868 DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2020. IN ADDITION, THE FUND ISSUED $26,987,531 OF PROGRAM-RELATED INVESTMENT (PRI) LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDING DECEMBER 31, 2020. SEE PART IX-B AND XV FOR A DETAILED LISTING OF LOANS AND GRANTS DURING THE CURRENT YEAR.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: PRI LOAN TO FREEDOM PREPARATORY ACADEMY, INC. TO PROMOTE HIGH-QUALITY CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH (IN PARTICIPATION WITH SCHOLA BUILDING FUND LLC).
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: PRI LOAN TO KIPP NASHVILLE TO PROMOTE HIGH-QUALITY CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND APPLICATIONS SHOULD BE SUBMITTED ONLINE AT WWW.CHARTERGROWTHFUND.ORG
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.SubmissionDeadlinesTxt: VARIED THROUGHOUT THE YEAR. GO TO OUR WEBSITE TO LEARN MORE: WWW.CHARTERGROWTHFUND.ORG
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: THE CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND IDENTIFIES THE COUNTRY'S BEST NONPROFIT PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOLS, FUNDS THEIR EXPANSION, AND HELPS TO INCREASE THEIR IMPACT. WE PROVIDE FUNDING AND SUPPORT TO A NATIONAL COMMUNITY OF SCHOOL LEADERS WHO SEEK TO GROW AND SERVE MORE STUDENTS, WHETHER THEY ARE EXPANDING FROM ONE TO TWO SCHOOLS, OR BUILDING A NETWORK OF MANY SCHOOLS. THE CHARTER SCHOOLS AND NETWORKS WE SUPPORT TYPICALLY OPERATE IN UNDERSERVED COMMUNITIES WITH LIMITED ACCESS TO HIGH-QUALITY SCHOOLS. WE FOCUS ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF HIGH-QUALITY CHARTER SCHOOLS.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: PRI EQUITY INVESTMENT TO OVERGRAD INC. TO SERVE A NEED AT SCHOOLS WITH LARGE NUMBERS OF LOW-INCOME STUDENTS IN PROVIDING BETTER TOOLS AND INFORMATION SO THAT STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS CAN MAKE INFORMED DECISIONS ABOUT THEIR POST-SECONDARY PATH. OVERGRAD'S CORE PRODUCT MAKES IT SIMPLE FOR STUDENTS, FAMILIES AND COUNSELORS TO SEARCH FOR COLLEGES, ASSESS ODDS OF ADMISSION, UNDERSTAND PERSONALIZED CHANGES OF GRADUATING FROM SPECIFIC COLLEGES, AND MANAGE THE COLLEGE APPLICATION AND FINANCIAL AID PROCESS.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: CHARTER FUND HAS NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF THE REPORT FROM THE RECIPIENT. THEREFORE, NO INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION OF THE REPORT WAS MADE.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: CHARTER FUND HAS NO REASON TO DOUBT THE ACCURACY OR RELIABILITY OF THE REPORT FROM THE RECIPIENT. THEREFORE, NO INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION OF THE REPORT WAS MADE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: DURING THE YEAR, DISQUALIFIED PERSONS INADVERTENTLY USED THE FOUNDATION CREDIT CARD FOR PERSONAL EXPENDITURES. THE TOTAL AMOUNT FOR 2020 WAS $77. THE AMOUNTS WERE REPAID TO THE FOUNDATION IN A TIMELY MANNER. SINCE THE TRANSACTION IS FOR THE USE OF MONEY, SELF-DEALING IS ON THE GREATER OF THE AMOUNT PAID FOR SUCH USE OR THE FAIR MARKET VALUE OF SUCH USE FOR THE PERIOD FOR WHICH THE MONEY IS USED (REG. 53.4941(E)-1(B)(2)(II)). NO INTEREST WAS CHARGED BY THE FOUNDATION FOR THESE FUNDS, THEREFORE THE 2020 SHORT TERM AFR RATES FOR THE APPLICABLE MONTHS HAVE BEEN USED TO CALCULATE THE AMOUNT INVOLVED FOR SELF-DEALING PURPOSES.DUE TO THE AMOUNTS BEING SMALL, THE BALANCES OUTSTANDING FOR A SHORT NUMBER OF DAYS, AND THE AFR RATES BEING LOW, THE AMOUNT INVOLVED IS ZERO WHEN ROUNDED TO THE NEAREST DOLLAR. THEREFORE, THE SELF-DEALING TAXES CALCULATED FOR THESE TRANSACTIONS IS ZERO. AS A RESULT, NO FORM 4720 HAS BEEN FILED.THE DISQUALIFIED PERSONS UNDERSTAND SUCH TRANSACTIONS MADE BY THE FOUNDATION ARE IMPERMISSIBLE. PROCEDURES HAVE BEEN IMPLEMENTED THAT ARE DESIGNED TO AVOID SUCH TRANSACTIONS IN THE FUTURE.

GeneralExplanationGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART VI, LINE 9 EXCISE TAX DUE
GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH FUND ("THE FUND") IS CURRENTLY IN ITS 60 MONTH TERMINATION PERIOD UNDER IRC SECTION 507(B)(1)(B) AND INTENDS TO OPERATE AS A PUBLIC CHARITY DURING THIS TIME. THIS 60 MONTH TERMINATION PERIOD WAS APPROVED BY THE IRS ON DECEMBER 13, 2019 AND EFFECTIVE FOR THE TAX YEAR BEGINNING JANUARY 1, 2020. THE FUND IS NOT REQUIRED TO PAY SECTION 4940 EXCISE TAX DURING ITS ADVANCE RULING PERIOD UNDER TREAS. REG. SECTION 1.507-2(D)(5), EVEN THOUGH THE FORM 990-PF REPORTS EXCISE TAX DUE IN PART VI, LINE 9. A COPY OF THIS SIGNED CONSENT TO EXTEND THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS ATTACHED TO THE FORM 990-PF.
